query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A high-key, minimalist composition in white and pale gray tones with soft tonal transitions. A subtle diagonal band of lighter gray appears at center, descending toward a small, darker gray amorphous form in the lower right corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph with extreme overexposure and flat lighting, rendered in muted, desaturated pale tones that abandon representational clarity. The image exhibits near-total absence of detail and texture, with mushy, smeared forms dissolving into a predominantly white field; subtle gray gradations are barely visible along a diagonal shape and a small darker mass in the lower right corner.
